title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair
notes: Constant stuttering during gameplay. Text does not display correctly in the menus

title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair
notes: Games window opens up with just a black screen and then closes. Tried different launch options and disabling overlay.

title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair
notes: Menus are sluggish, some font issues. Gameplay seems to run at 20 FPS instead of the 60fps native

title: Earth Defense Force 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair
notes: Runs beautifully, just the font is different.

title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair
notes: The game runs well, but it uses a system font for the text, presumably one that has a complete character set. Any text in the game that has unusual or foreign characters will not display properly.

title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair
notes: Font is not quite right, and will often display boxes instead of text for some menu items.
Game starts and shows main menu, but I'm unable to do anything there (no actual gameplay possible)
title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair

notes: game starts and runs but has lot of stuttering. also has some strange jittering when played in fullscreen, goes away in windows but still lot of stutter. Some Text is displayed as boxes.
title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair

notes: Fonts aren't correct and the game crashed after changing the screen resolution. There are stutters in the menu, but very playable.
title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair

notes: Any text input in this game crashes (Entering name, or chat), you have to use alternative software for chat, and you need to get save from windows machine to actually play, since creating new save will crash on text input. To fix broken text, you need to install additional fonts to the app compatdata directory. Other than that it works great.
title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair

notes:
Fonts are only 1/2 there, and I had to establish a player profile on a windows machine. Other than that, runs well at 60fps.
Initially I was running a nvidia gtx 970, and the game was unplayable through proton. Checking the reports here seemed to indicate a pattern of nvidia cards having trouble with this game. My 970 died, so I upgraded to a vega 64, and the game indeed runs fine. Likely conclusion: if you're running an nvidia card, you're SOL at the moment.
title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair

notes: Needed to create a save game under windows and copy it to linux. That's because you need to set your profile name in the beginning and text input boxes do hang the game. As was mentioned before some text isn't displayed correctly if anyone knows which font the game needs please report. Using the japanese lang setting none of the text is readable. Other than that single- and multiplayer work fine.
title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 4.1 The Shadow of New Despair

notes:
A save file must be created in Windows and transferred to Linux in order to play as of Proton Beta 3.16-6:
Dual boot to Windows, install game and create a save file, files directory located within %USERPROFILE%\Documents\My Games\EDF4.1\SAVE_DATA
Then boot to Linux, copy save files directory to <Steam-folder>/steamapps/compatdata/410320/pfx/
Some text is missing in game menus, but game is playable; completed first mission for testing
